## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `./mvnw verify` passes (Checkstyle, PMD, SpotBugs, tests)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for every changed behaviour
- [ ] Coaching prompt added if this introduces a new coached rule
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if this changes user-facing behaviour
- [ ] No magic numbers, star imports, or unused variables
